feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Rival Alpha’s Mate
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,961Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Stiles Stilinski is a part of the McCall Pack, not because he's a wolf- he's not, not because he's a spark, not even because he's knowledgeable, resourceful, loyal and reliable. He's only a part of the McCall Pack until Scott- his best friend or ex best friend in this situation- said he wasn't, he doesn't say it. Scott wants to use him. Scott was going to put Stiles up for auction and sell him to the highest bidder.Stiles refuses to be sold. Was Scott aware of what would become him if he were sold to any of the several packs wanting a taste of him? No, because Scott doesn't care.What Scott doesn't know is that Stiles has a past he's never spoken about, a past before Scott, a past not connected to the McCall pack. He was never really part of the McCall pack, he has always belonged to another.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: How to kill a cheating Werewolf in Three Easy Steps (And Other Lessons in Magic Parenting)
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,855Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 43

Summary: Derek walked in. He looked tired, his jawline still infuriatingly sharp, carved from the same mountain stone his ancestors had probably been hewn from. His eyes, those impossible emerald eyes that had haunted my dreams for years, looked hollow in a way I'd never seen before. There were shadows under them that spoke of sleepless nights, of a man who had been running on empty for far too long. But he wasn't alone. He was holding a baby. A baby. A baby who looked so much like him he could be a clone. "Derek," I said, my voice coming out strangled. "What the actual hell." I could feel everyone's eyes on me. Scott's were doing that thing where he was trying to convey "DO NOT KILL ME, I AM JUST THE MESSENGER" while also looking mildly constipated. Lydia had her "I'm analyzing every detail of this catastrophe" face on. Malia was, predictably, looking bored. And Derek— Derek was looking at me like I was the sun and the moon and all the stars, which was really inconvenient timing considering he was holding an affair baby.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Isaac Lahey/Scott McCall

entry.title: Just Keep Watchin'
entry.summary:
Author: sifshadowheart

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,189Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 169

Summary: After a leaked picture of who might have been Ilya Rozanov at a party in Moscow involving not-exactly-league-approved behavior, the Boston Bears' up-and-coming star was given an ultimatum: billet one of the new rookies through the upcoming season, or face the potential of being cut loose at the end of his ELC if he couldn't clean up his image. Rozanov assumed babysitting a rookie would be a buzzkill at a time going into his third season in Boston that should've been nothing but great hockey and convincing Hollander to finally let him at that ass. Then he found out the rookie he'd been paired with was Stiles Stilinski, and all his assumptions went flying out the window.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,186Chapters: 12/20Kudos: 49

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: A Thorough Examination
entry.summary:
Author: notyourtipicalauthor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,063Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Stiles hates doctor visits. Six years since his last physical, he finally shows up and gets more than he bargained for when his strikingly handsome nurse practitioner, Derek, decides to give him a very thorough exam. Stiles had always hated going to the doctor, but he quite literally loved his nurse practitioner.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,166Chapters: 34/45Kudos: 71

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: The Hales return…….or do they?
entry.summary:
Author: BeaconHills_Sterek

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,365Chapters: 10/11Kudos: 29

Summary: Derek, Cora and Peter hear a rumour that one of the Hales that supposedly died is still alive and in hiding, they set out to find them. entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,846Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 37

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: You'll Be In My Heart
entry.summary:
Author: FoxyTatty

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,057Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 71

Summary: 'Derek watches Stiles, the tired man cradling the small baby in his arms, with a soft smile and crinkles around his eyes. The sight makes Derek's heart clench, but in a soft, longing way, as if it's right but out of reach.' Derek Hale gets called to pick up a little baby Eli from the hospital despite not knowing he's a father. He has no choice but to stay with Stiles for a few days with Eli since he's the closest.

entry.title: you'll always be welcome here
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,215Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 66

Summary: “You know my dad knows I’ve got a boyfriend, right?” Stiles had said the other day, exaggeratedly exasperated when Derek had refused to drop him off any closer to Stiles’ house than the next street over.Derek had jerked around in a panic. “Does he know I’m—”An eyeroll so extreme it must have hurt. “No, Derek, he doesn’t know you’re my boyfriend.” And then, all of a sudden, Stiles had softened, and taken Derek’s hand where it was still in a death-vise around the steering wheel, and Derek’s brain had gone quiet all of a sudden, like static after someone severed the connection to an amp, and Stiles had kissed first Derek’s knuckles, then his palm, and then cupped Derek’s hand in his own. “No, he doesn’t know,” he said, quietly and reassuringly. “I won’t be telling him until you’re ready, I swear.” And just like that, the mischief came back to glint in his eyes. “But that doesn’t mean I’m not going to do my best to give you as many kicks in the ass as you need to make you be ready.”  Derek and Stiles are dating. Stiles' dad doesn't know. Until he does.

entry.title: Another Poly Story
entry.summary:
Author: HolmesMoriarty

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,236Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 204

Summary: “That’s what I wanted to talk to you about.” Stiles’ world falls apart after hearing this. It was a normal day, like any other, when his boyfriend of five years prepared a meal for them inside their apartment. Stiles thought he would be getting engaged tonight because he had never seen Derek cook even once. It was always Stiles’ thing, so he expected something, but not that.... “Stiles?” Derek asks as Stiles is frozen in place. His boyfriend sighs. “You don’t like the idea.” Of course, Stiles doesn’t!!! “What... Derek.” He closes his eyes, trying to breathe correctly. “Where is this coming from?” Derek opens his mouth, but Stiles isn’t done. “We’ve been together for five years, not once you expressed that you might be polyamorous. Not even once. So, you, asking out of the blue to open our relationship, doesn’t make much sense.”

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 1,589

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.

entry.title: Rewrite Your History
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,681Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 197

Summary: It was definitely not possible for Scott to have just said those words. "What?" Stiles asked again, because what else was he supposed to do? It wasn't possible. It just wasn't. "I said I don't think I can handle your fragile self anymore," Scott repeated. "You complain about everything. Everything hurts you. I don't know what to do anymore. Everything in this world will continue to hurt you. You can't protect yourself, so I'm always down a hand, because someone constantly has to be on 'Stiles duty.' You need to be babysat, and I can't afford to lose someone every time there's a threat in this city, because it happens a lot. And you keep putting yourself at risk. I don't know how to deal with this anymore. It's getting tiring."
